titleStmt.title: SII 17.509: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 509. (A.R. No. 470 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fifth pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the Tyāgarāja shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This records the gift of 180 sheep by Ayyāṟan Ambalattāḍi of Perumbuliyūr and Kaḷappāḷa Taṉṉichchai, the headman of Chiṟiñār in Iḍaiyaḷa-nāḍu for burning two perpetual lamps with one uri of ghee daily by the kēraḷāntakaṉ-nāḻi, in the shrine called Kēraḷāntakaṉ erected by the donor Ambalattāḍi for Bhuvaṉiviṭaṅkar of Tirumaṟaikkāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyuThe first few lines of the praśasti are lost.
m kuṭamalai nāṭum kol
lamuṅ kaliṅkamum tiṇ
ṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ
koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar
Ūḻiyuḷ ḷellāyāṇṭu
m toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yā
ṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecu ko
ḷ korācarācarācakecarivaṟ
maṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu tiru
maṟaikkāṭuṭaiya puvaṉivi
ṭaṅkatevarkku koyil kera
ḷāntakaṉ Eṭuppitta U
ṭaiyār paṇimakaṉ perumpuli
yūruṭaiyāṉ Aiyāṟaṉampala
ttāṭiyum Iṭaiyaḷa nāṭṭuc
ciṟiñār ciṟiñār kiḻavaṉ ka
ḷappāḷa taṉṉiccaiyum It
tevarkku cantirātittaval
vaitta tirunantā viḷakku
Iraṇṭiṉukku vaitta Āṭu
nūṟṟeṇpatuṅ keraḷāntaka
ṉ nāḻiyāl nittam Uriy
neyyaṭṭuvomāṉom Itte
variṭaiccāṉṟom [*] Itu pa
nmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.509 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
